dict.string: MotosyncBridge uses your location to find nearby places like restaurants, ATMs, and petrol stations.
MotosyncBridge uses your location to find nearby places and for future tracking features.
Motosync Bridge needs Bluetooth to connect to your Honda dashboard and stream track metadata.
Motosync Bridge needs Bluetooth to connect to your Honda dashboard and stream track metadata.
MotosyncBridge uses motion sensors to analyze road quality and log potholes during your ride.
